description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of the line relay model in the designated relay slot of the from bus end of a specified branch. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_rlmod_var(ibus, jbus, id, rs, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_rlmod_var(ibus, jbus, id, rs, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no relay model on this branch at the bus IBUS end.
relay model at bus IBUS end is aaa not xxx.
no VARs used in model NAME.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
